changes.description: Added strong directive to write and execute Node.js scripts instead of computing values mentally. Added ESM import-based script template with haversine/bearing functions.
changes.result: Both tasks scored 0/100. Model copied ESM import syntax incorrectly (missing closing brace in `import { readFileSync, writeFileSync  from 'fs'`), then got stuck in a loop trying to fix the identical edit. Also plate-boundary task had missing closing brace in object literal.

changes.description: Switched from ESM `import` to CommonJS `require('fs')` syntax which is simpler and less error-prone. Used `.js` extension instead of `.mjs`. Broke skill into modular code snippets (CSV parsing, distance matrix, closest pairs, nearest point, output writing) that the model can compose. Added explicit 'Do NOT delegate to subtasks' instruction.
changes.result: Both tasks scored 100/100 on two consecutive runs.
